title: How to Automate Content Creation With AI in 2026 (AI Content Repurposing)
summary: Trupeer AI automates video content creation and repurposing by converting screen recordings into multiple assets including polished tutorial videos, SOP documents, and translated versions. The tool uses AI avatars and voice cloning to reduce editing time from hours to minutes.
writeup: This video demonstrates Trupeer AI, a tool that converts screen recordings into polished assets including tutorial videos, SOP documents, and translated versions in minutes. It matters because it folds editing and localization into a single automated workflow rather than separate manual steps. The key takeaways: the platform uses custom AI avatars and voice cloning to generate narration, and machine translation produces localized versions for distribution across languages.
